name: Resource Full Within 7 Days
description: Detects resources projected to reach full capacity within 7 days based on current growth trends. Immediate action is required to prevent outages.
check_query: SELECT system_id, resource_type, resource_id, resource_name, days_until_full, growth_rate_bytes_per_day FROM capacity_projections WHERE system_id = ? AND days_until_full <= 7 AND days_until_full > 0
remediation_template: Resource '{{resource_name}}' ({{resource_type}}) is projected to be full in {{days_until_full}} days (growing at {{growth_rate_bytes_per_day}} bytes/day). Immediately add capacity, archive data, or reduce ingest rate.

name: Resource Full Within 30 Days
description: Detects resources projected to reach full capacity within 30 days but more than 7 days. Plan capacity expansion proactively.
check_query: SELECT system_id, resource_type, resource_id, resource_name, days_until_full, growth_rate_bytes_per_day FROM capacity_projections WHERE system_id = ? AND days_until_full > 7 AND days_until_full <= 30
remediation_template: Resource '{{resource_name}}' ({{resource_type}}) is projected to be full in {{days_until_full}} days. Plan capacity expansion or data lifecycle management to avoid disruptions.

name: Resource Full Within 90 Days
description: Detects resources projected to reach full capacity within 90 days. Include in capacity planning for upcoming procurement cycles.
check_query: SELECT system_id, resource_type, resource_id, resource_name, days_until_full, growth_rate_bytes_per_day FROM capacity_projections WHERE system_id = ? AND days_until_full > 30 AND days_until_full <= 90
remediation_template: Resource '{{resource_name}}' ({{resource_type}}) is projected to be full in {{days_until_full}} days. Include this resource in the next capacity planning review and procurement cycle.

name: Resource Utilization Critical
description: Detects resources with current utilization exceeding 95% across any platform. Resources at this level are at imminent risk of space exhaustion.
check_query: SELECT system_id, resource_type, resource_id, resource_name, utilization_pct FROM capacity_snapshots WHERE system_id = ? AND utilization_pct > 95
remediation_template: Resource '{{resource_name}}' ({{resource_type}}) is at {{utilization_pct}}% utilization. Take immediate action to free space or expand capacity before the resource becomes full.

name: Resource Utilization Warning
description: Detects resources with current utilization between 85% and 95% across any platform.
check_query: SELECT system_id, resource_type, resource_id, resource_name, utilization_pct FROM capacity_snapshots WHERE system_id = ? AND utilization_pct > 85 AND utilization_pct <= 95
remediation_template: Resource '{{resource_name}}' ({{resource_type}}) is at {{utilization_pct}}% utilization. Monitor closely and plan capacity expansion to prevent reaching critical levels.

name: Rapid Capacity Growth Detected
description: Detects resources with an unusually high growth rate (more than 5GB per day), which may indicate unexpected data ingest, backup sprawl, or runaway processes.
check_query: SELECT system_id, resource_type, resource_id, resource_name, days_until_full, growth_rate_bytes_per_day FROM capacity_projections WHERE system_id = ? AND growth_rate_bytes_per_day > 5368709120
remediation_template: Resource '{{resource_name}}' ({{resource_type}}) is growing at {{growth_rate_bytes_per_day}} bytes/day. Investigate the cause of rapid growth—check for backup sprawl, snapshot accumulation, or runaway application writes.

name: Negative Growth Anomaly
description: Detects resources with a significant negative growth rate, which may indicate large-scale data deletion, migration in progress, or data loss events.
check_query: SELECT system_id, resource_type, resource_id, resource_name, days_until_full, growth_rate_bytes_per_day FROM capacity_projections WHERE system_id = ? AND growth_rate_bytes_per_day < -1073741824
remediation_template: Resource '{{resource_name}}' ({{resource_type}}) is shrinking by {{growth_rate_bytes_per_day}} bytes/day. Verify this is expected (migration, cleanup) and not indicative of accidental data deletion.
